title: Renode UART console overlay for nRF52840 boards
description: T-Echo/RAK4631 use RTT/USB-CDC console which Renode cannot capture headlessly. Add a Renode-specific DT overlay + conf that routes the Zephyr console to uart0 (present in Renode nrf52840 platform at 0x40002000) so boot/log output is observable during Renode validation (bead project-LICHEN-r7h4.5).
close_reason: Renode console overlay/conf added (renode_console.overlay + .conf) routing console RTT->UARTE0; boot output observable headlessly and validated in r7h4.5.
